usStocks.name: NVIDIA
usStocks.description: NVIDIA Corporation is an American multinational technology company. It is known for its graphics processing units (GPUs).

usStocks.name: TESLA
usStocks.description: Tesla, Inc. is an American multinational automotive and clean energy company headquartered in Austin, Texas.

usStocks.name: GOOGLE
usStocks.description: Alphabet Inc. is an American multinational technology conglomerate. It is the parent company of Google.

krStocks.name: Samsung Electronics
krStocks.description: Samsung Electronics Co., Ltd. is a South Korean multinational electronics corporation headquartered in Yeongtong-gu, Suwon.

krStocks.name: SK Hynix
krStocks.description: SK Hynix Inc. is a South Korean memory semiconductor supplier of dynamic random-access memory chips and flash memory chips.
